channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cowboys' Jerry Jones raises eyebrows with old-school phrase but there's a good explanation
item.description: Dallas Cowboys team owner Jerry Jones raised eyebrows when he used an old-school phrase while talking about his feelings toward fans' visceral reactions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tyrese Maxey scores 43 to lift 76ers past LeBron, Lakers 118-104
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Tyrese Maxey scored 43 points to lead a Philadelphia 76ers team without injured Joel Embiid and Paul George to a 118-104 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press / AP, PHL 17

item.title: HS basketball coach suspended after hanging up Palestinian flag, refusing to shake hands with Jewish coaches
item.description: A high school basketball coach was suspended after he hung up a Palestinian flag and refused to shake hands with Jewish coaches during a game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City and PSG face unexpected early exit from Champions League in dramatic round of 18 games
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain each faces a shocking early exit from the Champions League for ,the first time in more than a decade when the final round of games Wednesday decide the new 36-team standings. When the 18 games kick off at the same time, 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors. For his grit and his drive. For doing all the little things many never saw.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Eberflus returns to Cowboys to run the defense; Sorensen takes over special teams
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Cowboys hired former Chicago Bears coach Matt Eberflus as defensive coordinator Tuesday for his second stint on the Dallas staff.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gisele Bündchen congratulated Eagles on Super Bowl LII win over Tom Brady, Alshon Jeffery says
item.description: Former Eagles wide receiver Alshon Jeffrey claims that Tom Brady's ex-wife Gisele Bundchen congratulated him after beating Brady in Super Bowl LII.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz drop fifth straight, losing at Memphis, 125-103
item.description: MEMPHIS (AP) - Jaren Jackson Jr. scored 28 points, Zach Edey added 19 points and four blocks and the Memphis Grizzlies won their sixth straight by beating the Utah Jazz 125-103 on Saturday night. Utah has now lost five in a row.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Military heroes honored at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The Farmers Insurance Open is not just showcasing some of the world’s best golfers — it’s also paying tribute to the heroes of our nation, offering service members special access and recognition throughout the week.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Profar agrees to $42M, 3-year contract with Braves
item.description: Jurickson Profar agreed to a $42 million, three-year contract with the Atlanta Braves on Thursday, less than a year after the outfielder got a $1 million deal from the San Diego Padres with spring training already underway.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation
